About.title: About Our Company
About.subtitle: We are building the future of smart FMCG distribution, connecting global manufacturers to local B2B markets with ultimate efficiency.

About.visionText: To be the backbone of quick commerce supply chains globally.
About.missionText: Delivering high-quality imported goods with unmatched reliability.
